Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Green Light]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — The Green Light is an entity that communicates with Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Tapping into the Green Light provides Alin with patience.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Green Light is a type of light within Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — The Green is a power of Elysia that Alin possesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Alin can use Green Light as a shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Green Light can form a dome of interlocking six-sided plates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Alin stands in a dome of Green Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Alin can layer multiple Green Light shields.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — The Green Light is a voice that can express disagreement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The Green Light can ground irritation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Alin drew on the Green Light to banish thoughts of vengeance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Simon summoned a shield of Green Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Green Light tells Alin to relax.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
